calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Anne Acuna, Esq. appeared for plaintiff David Wallace, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Douglass Insulation Company, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on February 1, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at Default Prove-Up Hearing was filed on April 25, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed today, May 29, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff David Wallace, and against the Defaulted Defendant: Douglass Insulation Company, Inc. as follows:

Accrued Interest - $150.68.
Costs - $200.00, for a total of $350.68.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
